title: Selection Scorecard (research/scorecard.json)
description: Output of the P-01 research-validate skill / selection engine, plan §2.1. Score = 2C + 1.5D + 1.5M + B + R (max 35). Build >= 22, Park 18-21, Reject < 18.

keyword.description: Main target keyword validated in P1.

D.description: Domain score (D-11: premium/aftermarket names score 0 regardless of quality).

M.description: Monetization score (CPM tier minus adblock exposure).

value.description: Monthly US search volume for the main keyword. Floor per plan §2.1 step 2: >= 1000.

source.description: Where the number came from, e.g. 'Ahrefs Free Keyword Generator', 'Google Keyword Planner', or '[ESTIMATE]'.

estimate.description: true if this number lacks a captured source artifact (plan §7.1 rule 3).

serp.description: Top-10 (or more) SERP evidence rows captured in P1 step 3.

decision.description: Derived from total per the Build>=22 / Park 18-21 / Reject<18 thresholds.

estimates.description: Free-text list of every [ESTIMATE]-tagged claim in this scorecard, mirrored into site.json ESTIMATES[] at P2.
